title: Domain Join and Machine Role Enum

steps.name: Inspect Compromised Host
steps.description: The attacker uses the existing shell on the host to determine its domain placement and machine role.

steps.name: Query Domain Join and Role Data
steps.description: Built-in system information and WMI queries request the host name, domain membership, logon server, and numeric domain role.
steps.cli:
systeminfo | findstr /B /C:"Host Name" /C:"Domain" /C:"Logon Server"
wmic computersystem get name,domain,partofdomain,domainrole

steps.name: Return Host Role Assessment
steps.description: The host returns domain-join status and role information so the attacker can distinguish workstation, member server, or domain infrastructure.
